description_long: This is a rustic wooden cup with a cylindrical body, featuring a prominent curved handle attached to one side. The cup is reinforced with two wide, dark metallic bands—one near the top and one near the bottom—giving it a sturdy, medieval appearance. The central section of the cup displays an intricate, geometric decorative pattern etched or burned into the wood, adding visual interest and craftsmanship. The wood grain is clearly visible, with natural knots and lines, suggesting it is made from a single piece of wood. The metallic bands have a slightly weathered, hammered texture, enhancing the cup's rugged aesthetic. The interior is smooth and unadorned, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A rustic wooden cup with a curved handle, reinforced by two dark metal bands and decorated with a geometric pattern on its body.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its handle prominently on the right, displaying the decorative pattern and both metal bands clearly.
description_view_1: The handle is centered and fully visible, with the wood grain and both metal bands in clear view.
description_view_2: The handle is on the left, and the decorative pattern and metal bands are visible, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: The handle is not visible, showing only the cylindrical wooden body with the decorative pattern and both metal bands.
